case_title: JMT LEASING INC. DBA THRIFTY CAR RENTAL VS OROPEZA, LORENA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,555.23 FILED BY JMT LEASING INC. DBA THRIFTY CAR RENTAL AS TO DEFENDANT OROPEZA, LORENA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-06-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 03
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT OROPEZA, LORENA
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $1,555.23 FILED BY OROPEZA, LORENA AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT JMT LEASING INC. DBA THRIFTY CAR RENTAL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-26-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERTIFIED MAIL TO JMT LEASING INC THRIFTY CAR RENTAL RETURNED SIGNED
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION OCT-06-1994, CONTINUED BY COURT TO OCT-26-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JMT LEASING INC. DBA THRIFTY CAR RENTAL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT OROPEZA, LORENA $1,553.23 PRINCIPAL, $55.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,608.23 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT OROPEZA, LORENA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT JMT LEASING INC. DBA THRIFTY CAR RENTAL STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT OROPEZA, LORENA
